content: PolyProfit — Rust + React prediction market trading bot for Polymarket. 7 crates workspace (pp-core, pp-feeds, pp-discovery, pp-strategy, pp-execution, pp-risk, pp-server). React frontend with TailwindCSS v4, Recharts, WebSocket real-time dashboard. Uses redb for persistence, polymarket-client-sdk for SDK. Dual mode: Demo/Live. Current state: compiles, 21 modified + 6 untracked files. Missing: tests for most crates, no CI/CD, no trade analytics, market filters UI incomplete, aggressive order strategy is TODO.

Architecture: Workspace with 7 crates. pp-core (types, config, db, error), pp-feeds (RTDS ws for Binance/Chainlink prices, CLOB orderbook ws), pp-discovery (Gamma API market fetch + classification), pp-strategy (fair_price models by MarketKind, signal_loop 500ms), pp-execution (orders Demo/Live, maker_loop 200ms cancel/replace, redeem_loop, fee_cache, heartbeat), pp-risk (RiskManager: daily loss/profit limits, drawdown, adverse fill streaks, Kelly sizing), pp-server (Axum API + WS tick 1Hz). Frontend: React 19, Vite 8, Tailwind v4, Recharts. TypeScript bindings via ts-rs.

Session 2026-03-31: Completed 5 tasks via 5 parallel agents. Added: (1) /api/markets endpoint + Markets.tsx tab with asset/kind/search filters, auto-refresh 30s; (2) Aggressive OrderStrategy with FOK market orders via SDK; (3) 75 new unit tests (94 total passing) across pp-core, pp-risk, pp-discovery; (4) /api/analytics endpoint (win rate, profit factor, per-asset breakdown) + /api/trades/export CSV; (5) Frontend builds, all Rust tests pass. Remaining: code-split frontend (>500KB chunk), add Analytics tab to frontend UI, backtest simulation mode.
